---

This action plan will ensure you are crystal clear on the action steps to get your desired results.
It is designed to supplement the 10X Podcast Manual (10xdownload.com/pc1) and it ties
together all the resources provided in the 10X Podcast System. Make it happen!
RESEARCH PODCASTS AND GET PREPARED	STEP
1
It is essential that you get clear on what you are trying to achieve and how you
plan to do it. While your strategy may change, it is hard to get traction without a
plan. The manual provides details on the various steps to prepare including:
• Podcast Directory Tutorial (10xresource.com/pc1)
• Podcast Launch Checklist (10xdownload.com/pc5)
Recommended Resource:
Launch Your Podcast and Start Monetizing!
YOUR GOAL
PODCAST ACTION PLAN
• What audience you want to serve
• Create persona(s) for your ideal viewer
• Choose a short slogan for your podcast
• Identify your primary keyword phrases
• Decide on a regular posting schedule
• Research industry competitor shows
• Subscribe to all relevant podcasts
• Schedule recording regular episodes
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

CREATE HOSTING ACCOUNT AND RSS FEED	STEP
2
Your hosting service is the central hub for all your podcasts and associated data.
Get it set up and get familiar with how it all works. Ultimately, the RSS feed
provided is what you will submit to the podcast directories.
RECORD AND EDIT YOUR FIRST FEW PODCASTS	STEP
3
You can record as a video podcast, or audio only. We recommend having
multiple episodes ready to go before you officially launch. The frequency of
episodes is up to you, but the important part is to be consistent. The manual
provides lots of tips on booking guests, structuring your show, interviewing, etc.
NOTE: While you can learn to edit your podcasts yourself, there are also options
to have the editing handled for you. We’ve provided recommended options for
each below.
UPLOAD SHOWS AND CREATE SHOW NOTES	STEP
4
When you’re ready to go live with your show, you will upload your initial
episodes to your hosting platform. Remember that you need more than just
the audio file to optimize your podcast submission. You’ll want to include an
image, description and all other details included in the show notes. See the
manual and checklist for more details.
• Podcast Hosting Tour Video (10xresource.com/pc2)
• Libsyn Podcast Hosting (10xresource.com/libysyn)
Recommended Resource:
• Podcast Creation Checklist (10xdownload.com/pc7)
• Podcast Brainstorm Flowchart (10xdownload.com/pc3)
• Grant’s Hosting Swipe File (10xdownload.com/pc10)
• Descript Editing Software (10xresource.com/descript)
• Resonate Editing Service (10xresource.com/resonate)
Recommended Resource:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

SUBMIT RSS FEEDS TO DIRECTORIES (ONCE)	STEP
5
Once uploaded, your episodes will automatically be added to your RSS feed.
At that point, you will want to submit your podcast RSS feed to any podcast
directory you wish to be posted on. A listing of directories and more details
can be found in the manual.
IMPORTANT: We recommend that you have a very intentional launch date
and plan when you first upload your podcasts. See the manual section titled
“Podcast Launch Formula”.
• Podcast Lifecycle Flowchart (10xdownload.com/pc3)
• Podcast Launch Checklist (10xdownload.com/pc5)
• Podcast Directory Tour (10xresource.com/pc1)
Recommended Resources:
• Podcast Creation Checklist (10xdownload.com/pc7)
Recommended Resource:
POST ON YOUR WEBSITE AND PROMOTE	STEP
6
Once your podcasts start showing up on the directories, you will immediately
want to start promoting them in any way that you can. This starts by posting on
your own website, which will include your show notes. It is important to let
people know why your podcast will be of value to them. Here are just a few ways
that you will promote…
Share on Facebook, Instagram, Linkedin and any other social channel.
Ideally put the link in a comment to maximize reach.
Include a link to your Apple or Spotify on your website, on business
cards, in your email footer, anywhere you can think of.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

• Podcast Promotion Checklist (10xdownload.com/pc8)
• Podcast Website Tour Video (10xresource.com/pc3)
Recommended Resources:
If you have an email and/or text list, send out a message announcing
your new episodes and inviting people to subscribe.
TIP: To maximize your initial launch, you may want to build a little hype in
advance with a trailer. More details in the manual.
IMPLEMENT MONETIZATION STRATEGIES	STEP
7
While you don’t need to wait to go live to begin monetization, the more listeners
you get, the more energy you should put into maximizing your revenue. As you’ll
see in the manual, there are many ways to turn your podcast into cash…
Remember that getting off the ground is the hardest part. Take it one episode at
a time and keep going!
• Sponsorship/Ads
• Affiliate Products
• Branded Merchandise
• Premium Memberships
• Donations/Patheon
• Coaching/Consulting
• Paid Speaking Gigs
• Join Network/Sell Show
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
